name: Applied AI Consulting
summary: AI, cloud, DevOps, and product engineering company delivering enterprise modernization programs and automation solutions.

name: OpsRabbit
summary: AI-powered CloudOps/SRE incident investigation and automation platform focused on reducing MTTR and improving operational reliability.

name: 7Targets AI Assistants
summary: AI-assisted sales follow-up and response automation platform for outbound/inbound sales workflows.

name: DocuLens
summary: AI document intelligence product focused on summarization, extraction, translation, OCR, redaction, and chat-over-documents workflows.

name: OpexSoftware
summary: DevOps and cloud automation services company; acquired by REAN Cloud in August 2016.

name: REAN Cloud DevSecOps Platform Work
summary: Built and scaled cloud infrastructure automation and DevSecOps capabilities after OpexSoftware joined REAN Cloud.

name: DeployNow (REAN Cloud)
summary: Deployment acceleration product initiative aligned with cloud automation, release reliability, and enterprise-scale delivery workflows.

name: TestNow (REAN Cloud)
summary: Testing acceleration product initiative for enterprise cloud delivery with stronger validation coverage and faster release cycles.

name: REAN Cloud Platform Products
summary: Platform product portfolio including DeployNow, TestNow, and related cloud/DevOps accelerators for enterprise software delivery.

name: Cloud Infrastructure Code Generation (Patent-backed Work)
summary: Invented methods for generating code used to deploy cloud infrastructure; published and granted as US11099976B2.

name: Cloud Test Infrastructure Generation (Patent-backed Work)
summary: Invented systems for generating cloud testing infrastructure for software applications; published and granted as US11074165B2.

name: AAIC Accelerators (GTAF, aiTest, SLS API Generator, Marxeed)
summary: Worked on productized accelerators and platforms for DevOps, quality engineering, AI-enabled delivery workflows, API generation, and Marxeed blog optimization.

name: BMC IT Data Analytics (ITDA)
summary: Led work on BMC IT Data Analytics, separate from the later Helix branding. Helped build and launch the product, focusing on operational log analytics, search-driven troubleshooting, and practical visibility for IT operations teams.

name: Monitoring and ITSM Integration Solution
summary: Worked on an integration solution connecting monitoring signals with IT service management workflows. The project helped operations teams turn alerts and events into actionable service-management context for incident handling and follow-through.

name: ProactiveNet Integration and Release Management
summary: Contributed to ProactiveNet integration work after its acquisition by BMC and helped manage product releases afterward. The work involved coordinating integration, release readiness, engineering execution, and operational quality across product teams.

name: United Nations Customer Project (TCS)
summary: Worked on a United Nations customer project during the TCS period, including direct customer-facing work and visits to Tokyo and the Netherlands. The experience involved enterprise delivery, implementation support, and collaboration across international customer stakeholders.

name: Target Guest Database Platform (TCS)
summary: Worked with Target US during the TCS period to help build a guest database platform. The work included onsite collaboration in the United States, enterprise data engineering, customer coordination, and delivery support for a large retail technology environment.
